response.global_analysis: The video features Natsuiro Matsuri performing two songs: 'Sekaiichi Kawaii Watashi' (by Fujita Kotone) and 'Geneki Idol Chu~' (by =LOVE). The provided Reference JSON lyrics for the first song were incomplete and did not match the full verse structure sung in the video, so I relied primarily on the audio and on-screen text for transcription. The second song was identified from the on-screen title card. Timestamps are strictly synchronized to the vocal audio waveform, with pauses handled by splitting blocks to maintain semantic continuity.

subtitles.original: 世界一？可愛い
subtitles.english: Cutest in the world? Cute!

subtitles.original: 宇宙一？可愛い
subtitles.english: Cutest in the universe? Cute!

subtitles.original: もっともっと聞かせて
subtitles.english: Let me hear it more and more!

subtitles.original: よそ見はダメ！OK？
subtitles.english: No looking away! OK?

subtitles.original: 瞬きも可愛い
subtitles.english: Even my blinking is cute!

subtitles.original: 存在が可愛い
subtitles.english: My very existence is cute!

subtitles.original: もっともっと聞かせて
subtitles.english: Let me hear it more and more!

subtitles.original: ご褒美は… 目を閉じて…
subtitles.english: The reward is... close your eyes...

subtitles.original: ちゅ…
subtitles.english: Mwah...

subtitles.original: 歌ってくれて サンキュー
subtitles.english: Thank you for singing along!

subtitles.original: 笑顔くれて サンキュー
subtitles.english: Thank you for the smiles!

subtitles.original: 生きててよかったって思った
subtitles.english: I'm so glad I'm alive, I thought.

subtitles.original: ちょっとのミスは愛嬌
subtitles.english: A little mistake is just part of my charm!

subtitles.original: だけどやる気は最強
subtitles.english: But my motivation is the strongest!

subtitles.original: 競い合って 高め合って
subtitles.english: Competing and improving together...

subtitles.original: せーので 行こう！
subtitles.english: On the count of three, let's go!

subtitles.original: 苦手からずっと逃げてちゃ
subtitles.english: If you keep running from what you're bad at,

subtitles.original: 愛は届かないから
subtitles.english: love will never reach you.

subtitles.original: だから何度も 何度も挑もう
subtitles.english: So let's challenge it again and again!

subtitles.original: 楽しんじゃおう！
subtitles.english: Let's just have fun!

subtitles.original: あざとくて 可愛い
subtitles.english: Being calculatingly cute!

subtitles.original: 最高に 可愛い
subtitles.english: Being the absolute cutest!

subtitles.original: 私だけを見ていて
subtitles.english: Keep your eyes only on me!

subtitles.original: よそ見はダメ！OK？
subtitles.english: No looking away! OK?

subtitles.original: 瞬きも 可愛い
subtitles.english: Even my blinking is cute!

subtitles.original: 存在が 可愛い
subtitles.english: My very existence is cute!

subtitles.original: もっともっと聞かせて
subtitles.english: Let me hear it more and more!

subtitles.original: 輝くから 約束ね
subtitles.english: I'll keep on shining, so promise me!

subtitles.original: 上手く歌えてるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'm singing well...

subtitles.original: 上手く踊れてるかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'm dancing well...

subtitles.original: 間違うの怖くなるけど
subtitles.english: I get scared of making mistakes, but...

subtitles.original: できるできるできるできる そうだ！
subtitles.english: I can do it, I can do it, yes!

subtitles.original: 信じてくれる人がいる
subtitles.english: Because there's someone who believes in me!

subtitles.original: この歌で君と繋がっていられる
subtitles.english: This song keeps me connected to you!

subtitles.original: 忘れられないストーリー描いていこう
subtitles.english: Let's keep writing an unforgettable story!

subtitles.original: 行くよ！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: 世界一！可愛い
subtitles.english: The cutest in the world! Cute!

subtitles.original: 宇宙一！可愛い
subtitles.english: The cutest in the universe! Cute!

subtitles.original: もっともっと聞かせて
subtitles.english: Let me hear it more and more!

subtitles.original: よそ見はダメ！OK？
subtitles.english: No looking away! OK?

subtitles.original: 瞬きも 可愛い
subtitles.english: Even my blinking is cute!

subtitles.original: 存在が 可愛い
subtitles.english: My very existence is cute!

subtitles.original: もっともっと聞かせて
subtitles.english: Let me hear it more and more!

subtitles.original: ご褒美は 目を閉じて
subtitles.english: The reward is... close your eyes...

subtitles.original: ちゅ！
subtitles.english: Mwah!

subtitles.original: 今日も鏡をチェック
subtitles.english: Checking the mirror again today!

subtitles.original: 最高の笑顔届ける才能に
subtitles.english: Even with a talent for delivering the best smiles,

subtitles.original: 甘えないの 努力が大事よ
subtitles.english: I won't be complacent; effort is what matters!

subtitles.original: ちゃんと お勉強して
subtitles.english: Studying properly,

subtitles.original: ちゃんと お片付けする
subtitles.english: and tidying up properly,

subtitles.original: だって私はアイドルだもん
subtitles.english: because I'm an idol, after all!

subtitles.original: 好きなタイプは私
subtitles.english: My favorite type is 'me'!

subtitles.original: 大好きで マジ一途な人
subtitles.english: Someone who loves me and is truly devoted!

subtitles.original: ぴったりの君だけど 今じゃない
subtitles.english: You're a perfect match, but not right now!

subtitles.original: ナンバーワンはもっと先だけど
subtitles.english: Becoming number one is still a way off, but...

subtitles.original: 君だけのものに なれないの ああごめん
subtitles.english: I can't belong to you alone, oh, I'm sorry!

subtitles.original: いつまでも好きでいて 約束よ
subtitles.english: Please love me forever, it's a promise!

subtitles.original: わがままなお願いね みんなのものでいたい
subtitles.english: A selfish request, isn't it? I want to belong to everyone!

subtitles.original: それでも私のこと 好きですか？
subtitles.english: Even so, do you still love me?

subtitles.original: ピンク色のフリフリ
subtitles.english: Pink frilly clothes,

subtitles.original: スポットライト浴びて
subtitles.english: bathed in the spotlight,

subtitles.original: いつかきっとね 君だけの私に
subtitles.english: someday I'll surely be yours alone.

subtitles.original: 今はもっと歌いたい
subtitles.english: But for now, I want to sing more!

subtitles.original: 現役アイドルちゅ〜
subtitles.english: Active Idol Chu~!
